serverSettings.title: Server Settings
serverSettings.description: Main server configuration and gameplay settings

cryoSickness.title: Cryo Sickness and Cryopod Nerf
cryoSickness.description: Cryopod sickness and creature nerf settings

ActiveMods.title: Active mods
ActiveMods.description: Comma-separated list of mod IDs with no spaces. Priority is in descending order (left-most has highest priority).

ActiveTotalConversion.title: Total conversion mod
ActiveTotalConversion.description: Used to specify a total conversion mod.

AdminLogging.title: Admin logging
AdminLogging.description: If True, logs all admin commands to in-game chat.

AllowAnyoneBabyImprintCuddle.title: Allow anyone baby imprint
AllowAnyoneBabyImprintCuddle.description: If True, allows anyone to care for baby creatures, not just who imprinted.

AllowCrateSpawnsOnTopOfStructures.title: Allow crate spawns on structures
AllowCrateSpawnsOnTopOfStructures.description: If True, allows supply crates to appear on top of structures.

AllowCryoFridgeOnSaddle.title: Allow cryo fridge on saddle
AllowCryoFridgeOnSaddle.description: If True, allows cryofridges on platform saddles and rafts.

AllowFlyingStaminaRecovery.title: Allow flyer stamina recovery
AllowFlyingStaminaRecovery.description: If True, allows server to recover stamina when standing on a flyer.

AllowHideDamageSourceFromLogs.title: Hide damage source from logs
AllowHideDamageSourceFromLogs.description: If False, shows damage sources in tribe logs.

AllowIntegratedSPlusStructures.title: Allow S+ structures
AllowIntegratedSPlusStructures.description: If False, disables all new S+ structures.

AllowMultipleAttachedC4.title: Allow multiple C4
AllowMultipleAttachedC4.description: If True, allows attaching more than one C4 per creature.

AllowRaidDinoFeeding.title: Allow raid dino feeding
AllowRaidDinoFeeding.description: If True, allows Titanosaurs to be permanently tamed.

AllowTekSuitPowersInGenesis.title: TEK suit powers in Genesis
AllowTekSuitPowersInGenesis.description: If True, enables TEK suit powers in Genesis: Part 1.

AllowThirdPersonPlayer.title: Allow third person
AllowThirdPersonPlayer.description: If False, disables third person camera on dedicated servers.

AlwaysAllowStructurePickup.title: Always allow structure pickup
AlwaysAllowStructurePickup.description: If True, disables timer on quick pick-up system.

AlwaysNotifyPlayerLeft.title: Always notify player left
AlwaysNotifyPlayerLeft.description: If True, players will always be notified when someone leaves.

ArmadoggoDeathCooldown.title: Armadoggo death cooldown
ArmadoggoDeathCooldown.description: Cooldown in seconds for Armadoggo to reappear after fatal damage.

AutoDestroyDecayedDinos.title: Auto destroy decayed dinos
AutoDestroyDecayedDinos.description: If True, auto-destroys claimable decayed tames on load.

AutoDestroyOldStructuresMultiplier.title: Auto destroy old structures
AutoDestroyOldStructuresMultiplier.description: Multiplier for auto-destruction of old structures.

AutoSavePeriodMinutes.title: Auto save interval
AutoSavePeriodMinutes.description: Interval in minutes for automatic saves. 0 = constant saving.

bForceCanRideFliers.title: Force ride flyers
bForceCanRideFliers.description: If True, allows flyers on maps where normally disabled.

BanListURL.title: Ban list URL
BanListURL.description: URL to a global ban list.

ClampItemSpoilingTimes.title: Clamp item spoiling times
ClampItemSpoilingTimes.description: If True, clamps all spoiling times to maximum.

ClampItemStats.title: Clamp item stats
ClampItemStats.description: If True, enables stats clamping for items.

ClampResourceHarvestDamage.title: Clamp resource harvest damage
ClampResourceHarvestDamage.description: If True, limits damage by tames based on resource health.

CosmeticWhitelistOverride.title: Cosmetic whitelist URL
CosmeticWhitelistOverride.description: URL to comma-separated list of whitelisted cosmetics.

CosmoWeaponAmmoReloadAmount.title: Cosmo weapon ammo reload
CosmoWeaponAmmoReloadAmount.description: Amount of ammo given as Cosmo webslinger reloads.

CustomDynamicConfigUrl.title: Dynamic config URL
CustomDynamicConfigUrl.description: Direct link to a live dynamicconfig.ini file.

CustomLiveTuningUrl.title: Live tuning URL
CustomLiveTuningUrl.description: Direct link to the live tuning file.

DayCycleSpeedScale.title: Day cycle speed
DayCycleSpeedScale.description: Scaling factor for passage of time in ARK.

DestroyTamesOverTheSoftTameLimit.title: Destroy tames over soft limit
DestroyTamesOverTheSoftTameLimit.description: Tames above soft tame limit will be marked for Cryo.

DestroyUnconnectedWaterPipes.title: Destroy unconnected pipes
DestroyUnconnectedWaterPipes.description: If True, auto-destroys unconnected pipes after 2 days.

DinoCharacterFoodDrainMultiplier.title: Dino food drain
DinoCharacterFoodDrainMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for creature food consumption.

DinoCharacterHealthRecoveryMultiplier.title: Dino health recovery
DinoCharacterHealthRecoveryMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for creature health recovery.

DinoCharacterStaminaDrainMultiplier.title: Dino stamina drain
DinoCharacterStaminaDrainMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for creature stamina consumption.

DinoDamageMultiplier.title: Dino damage multiplier
DinoDamageMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for wild creature damage.

DinoResistanceMultiplier.title: Dino resistance multiplier
DinoResistanceMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for wild creature resistance.

DisableCryopodEnemyCheck.title: Disable cryopod enemy check
DisableCryopodEnemyCheck.description: If True, allows cryopods with enemies nearby.

DisableCryopodFridgeRequirement.title: Disable cryopod fridge requirement
DisableCryopodFridgeRequirement.description: If True, allows cryopods without powered cryofridge.

DisableDinoDecayPvE.title: Disable dino decay PvE
DisableDinoDecayPvE.description: If True, disables creature decay in PvE mode.

DisableImprintDinoBuff.title: Disable imprint dino buff
DisableImprintDinoBuff.description: If True, disables creature imprinting stat bonus.

DisablePvEGamma.title: Disable PvE gamma
DisablePvEGamma.description: If True, prevents console gamma in PvE mode.

DisableStructureDecayPvE.title: Disable structure decay PvE
DisableStructureDecayPvE.description: If True, disables auto-decay of structures in PvE.

DontAlwaysNotifyPlayerJoined.title: Disable player joined notification
DontAlwaysNotifyPlayerJoined.description: If True, globally disables player join notifications.

EnableExtraStructurePreventionVolumes.title: Enable structure prevention volumes
EnableExtraStructurePreventionVolumes.description: If True, disables building in resource-rich areas.

EnablePvPGamma.title: Enable PvP gamma
EnablePvPGamma.description: If True, allows console gamma in PvP mode.

ExtinctionEventTimeInterval.title: Extinction event interval
ExtinctionEventTimeInterval.description: Time in seconds to enable extinction mode.

FastDecayUnsnappedCoreStructures.title: Fast decay unsnapped structures
FastDecayUnsnappedCoreStructures.description: If True, unsnapped foundations decay faster.

ForceAllStructureLocking.title: Force all structure locking
ForceAllStructureLocking.description: If True, defaults all structures to locked.

ForceGachaUnhappyInCaves.title: Force Gacha unhappy in caves
ForceGachaUnhappyInCaves.description: If True, Gachas become unhappy within caves.

globalVoiceChat.title: Global voice chat
globalVoiceChat.description: If True, voice chat becomes global.

HarvestHealthMultiplier.title: Harvest health multiplier
HarvestHealthMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for item harvest health.

IgnoreLimitMaxStructuresInRangeTypeFlag.title: Ignore structure limit
IgnoreLimitMaxStructuresInRangeTypeFlag.description: If True, removes 150 decorative structure limit.

ImplantSuicideCD.title: Implant suicide cooldown
ImplantSuicideCD.description: Cooldown in seconds between implant respawn uses.

ItemStackSizeMultiplier.title: Item stack size multiplier
ItemStackSizeMultiplier.description: Multiplier for global item stack size.

KickIdlePlayersPeriod.title: Kick idle players period
KickIdlePlayersPeriod.description: Time in seconds before idle players are kicked.

MaxCosmoWeaponAmmo.title: Max Cosmo weapon ammo
MaxCosmoWeaponAmmo.description: Maximum ammo for Cosmo webslinger. -1 = unlimited.

MaxHexagonsPerCharacter.title: Max hexagons
MaxHexagonsPerCharacter.description: Maximum hexagons a character can accumulate.

MaxTamedDinos.title: Max tamed dinos
MaxTamedDinos.description: Maximum number of tame creatures on server.

MaxTamedDinos_SoftTameLimit_CountdownFor.title: Soft tame deletion countdown
MaxTamedDinos_SoftTameLimit_CountdownFor.description: Time in seconds before tame is destroyed.

MaxTrainCars.title: Max train cars
MaxTrainCars.description: Maximum amount of carts a train cave can have.

MaxTributeItems.title: Max tribute items
MaxTributeItems.description: Slots for uploaded items and resources.

NightTimeSpeedScale.title: Night time speed
NightTimeSpeedScale.description: Scaling factor for passage of time during night.

NonPermanentDiseases.title: Non-permanent diseases
NonPermanentDiseases.description: If True, makes permanent diseases not permanent.

NPCNetworkStasisRangeScalePlayerCountSta.title: NPC stasis range start
NPCNetworkStasisRangeScalePlayerCountSta.description: Minimum online players for stasis range scaling.

NPCNetworkStasisRangeScalePlayerCountEnd.title: NPC stasis range end
NPCNetworkStasisRangeScalePlayerCountEnd.description: Maximum online players for stasis range scaling.

NPCNetworkStasisRangeScalePercentEnd.title: NPC stasis range percent
NPCNetworkStasisRangeScalePercentEnd.description: Maximum scale percentage when stasis range end reached.

OnlyAutoDestroyCoreStructures.title: Only auto destroy core structures
OnlyAutoDestroyCoreStructures.description: If True, prevents non-core structures from auto-destroying.

OnlyDecayUnsnappedCoreStructures.title: Only decay unsnapped core
OnlyDecayUnsnappedCoreStructures.description: If True, only unsnapped core structures decay.

OverrideStructurePlatformPrevention.title: Override structure platform prevention
OverrideStructurePlatformPrevention.description: If True, turrets become buildable on platforms.

OxygenSwimSpeedStatMultiplier.title: Oxygen swim speed multiplier
OxygenSwimSpeedStatMultiplier.description: Multiplier for swim speed from oxygen stat.

PerPlatformMaxStructuresMultiplier.title: Per platform structure multiplier
PerPlatformMaxStructuresMultiplier.description: Increases max items on saddles and rafts.

PersonalTamedDinosSaddleStructureCost.title: Personal tamed saddle cost
PersonalTamedDinosSaddleStructureCost.description: Tame slots used by platform saddle.

PlayerCharacterFoodDrainMultiplier.title: Player food drain
PlayerCharacterFoodDrainMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for player food consumption.

PlayerCharacterHealthRecoveryMultiplier.title: Player health recovery
PlayerCharacterHealthRecoveryMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for player health recovery.

PlayerCharacterStaminaDrainMultiplier.title: Player stamina drain
PlayerCharacterStaminaDrainMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for player stamina consumption.

PlayerCharacterWaterDrainMultiplier.title: Player water drain
PlayerCharacterWaterDrainMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for player water consumption.

PlayerDamageMultiplier.title: Player damage multiplier
PlayerDamageMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for player attack damage.

PlayerResistanceMultiplier.title: Player resistance multiplier
PlayerResistanceMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for player damage resistance.

PreventMateBoost.title: Prevent mate boost
PreventMateBoost.description: If True, disables creature mate boosting.

PreventOfflinePvP.title: Prevent offline PvP
PreventOfflinePvP.description: If True, enables Offline Raiding Prevention.

PreventSpawnAnimations.title: Prevent spawn animations
PreventSpawnAnimations.description: If True, players spawn without wake-up animation.

ProximityChat.title: Proximity chat
ProximityChat.description: If True, only nearby players see chat.

PvEAllowStructuresAtSupplyDrops.title: PvE allow structures at drops
PvEAllowStructuresAtSupplyDrops.description: If True, allows building near supply drops in PvE.

PvEStructureDecayPeriodMultiplier.title: PvE structure decay multiplier
PvEStructureDecayPeriodMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for structure decay in PvE.

PvPDinoDecay.title: PvP dino decay
PvPDinoDecay.description: If True, enables creatures decay in PvP.

PvPStructureDecay.title: PvP structure decay
PvPStructureDecay.description: If True, enables structure decay in PvP.

RandomSupplyCratePoints.title: Random supply crate points
RandomSupplyCratePoints.description: If True, supply drops in random locations.

RCONServerGameLogBuffer.title: RCON game log buffer
RCONServerGameLogBuffer.description: Lines of game logs sent over RCON.

ResourcesRespawnPeriodMultiplier.title: Resources respawn multiplier
ResourcesRespawnPeriodMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for resource node respawn.

ServerAutoForceRespawnWildDinosInterval.title: Auto respawn wild dinos
ServerAutoForceRespawnWildDinosInterval.description: Force respawn wild dinos after seconds.

ServerForceNoHUD.title: Server force no HUD
ServerForceNoHUD.description: If True, HUD always disabled for NPCs.

serverPVE.title: Server PvE
serverPVE.description: If True, disables PvP and enables PvE.

ShowFloatingDamageText.title: Show floating damage
ShowFloatingDamageText.description: If True, enables popup damage text.

ShowMapPlayerLocation.title: Show map player location
ShowMapPlayerLocation.description: If False, hides player position on map.

StructureDamageMultiplier.title: Structure damage multiplier
StructureDamageMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for structure attack damage.

StructurePickupTimeAfterPlacement.title: Structure pickup after placement
StructurePickupTimeAfterPlacement.description: Seconds after placement for quick pick-up.

StructureResistanceMultiplier.title: Structure resistance multiplier
StructureResistanceMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for structure damage resistance.

TamedDinoDamageMultiplier.title: Tamed dino damage
TamedDinoDamageMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for tame creature damage.

TamedDinoResistanceMultiplier.title: Tamed dino resistance
TamedDinoResistanceMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for tame creature resistance.

TamingSpeedMultiplier.title: Taming speed multiplier
TamingSpeedMultiplier.description: Scaling factor for creature taming speed.

TheMaxStructuresInRange.title: Max structures in range
TheMaxStructuresInRange.description: Maximum structures in a certain range.

TribeLogDestroyedEnemyStructures.title: Tribe log destroyed structures
TribeLogDestroyedEnemyStructures.description: Shows enemy destruction in tribe logs.

UseFjordurTraversalBuff.title: Use Fjordur traversal buff
UseFjordurTraversalBuff.description: If True, enables Fjordur biome teleport.

UseOptimizedHarvestingHealth.title: Use optimized harvesting
UseOptimizedHarvestingHealth.description: If True, enables server harvesting optimization.

CrossARKAllowForeignDinoDownloads.title: CrossARK foreign dino downloads
CrossARKAllowForeignDinoDownloads.description: If True, enables non-native creature downloads.

noTributeDownloads.title: No tribute downloads
noTributeDownloads.description: If True, prevents CrossARK data downloads.

EnableCryoSicknessPVE.title: Enable cryo sickness PvE
EnableCryoSicknessPVE.description: If True, enables cryopod cooldown timer in PvE.

EnableCryopodNerf.title: Enable cryopod nerf
EnableCryopodNerf.description: If True, disables cryopod cooldown timer.

CryoHospitalHoursToRegenHP.title: Cryo hospital HP regen
CryoHospitalHoursToRegenHP.description: Hours to regenerate HP in cryo.

CryoHospitalHoursToRegenFood.title: Cryo hospital food regen
CryoHospitalHoursToRegenFood.description: Hours to regenerate food in cryo.

CryoHospitalHoursToDrainTorpor.title: Cryo hospital torpor drain
CryoHospitalHoursToDrainTorpor.description: Hours to drain torpor in cryo.

bFilterChat.title: Filter chat
bFilterChat.description: If True, filters chat based on word lists.

LimitBunkersPerTribe.title: Limit bunkers per tribe
LimitBunkersPerTribe.description: If True, limits bunkers per tribe.

LimitBunkersPerTribeNum.title: Max bunkers per tribe
LimitBunkersPerTribeNum.description: Number of bunkers allowed per tribe.

AllowBunkersInPreventionZones.title: Allow bunkers in prevention zones
AllowBunkersInPreventionZones.description: If True, allows bunkers in prevention zones.

AllowRidingDinosInsideBunkers.title: Allow riding inside bunkers
AllowRidingDinosInsideBunkers.description: If True, allows riding inside bunkers.

AllowBunkerModulesAboveGround.title: Allow bunker modules above ground
AllowBunkerModulesAboveGround.description: If True, allows modules above ground.

AllowDinoAIInsideBunkers.title: Allow dino AI inside bunkers
AllowDinoAIInsideBunkers.description: If True, allows dino AI inside bunkers.

AllowBunkerModulesInPreventionZones.title: Allow modules in prevention zones
AllowBunkerModulesInPreventionZones.description: If True, allows modules in prevention zones.

EnemyAccessBunkerHPThreshold.title: Enemy access bunker HP threshold
EnemyAccessBunkerHPThreshold.description: HP threshold for enemy bunker access.

BunkerUnderHPThresholdDmgMultiplier.title: Bunker under HP damage
BunkerUnderHPThresholdDmgMultiplier.description: Damage multiplier when under HP threshold.

AdminListURL.title: Admin list URL
AdminListURL.description: Alternative to admin whitelist files using a remote web resource. Update frequency is controlled by UpdateAllowedCheatersInterval.

AutoRestartIntervalSeconds.title: Auto restart interval
AutoRestartIntervalSeconds.description: Time in seconds after which the server automatically restarts. Wiki notes it may shut the server down instead of restarting correctly.

ChatLogFileSplitIntervalSeconds.title: Chat log split interval
ChatLogFileSplitIntervalSeconds.description: Controls chat log file split interval in seconds. Values lower than 45 get forced to 45.

ChatLogFlushIntervalSeconds.title: Chat log flush interval
ChatLogFlushIntervalSeconds.description: Controls how often chat logs are flushed to disk in seconds. Values lower than 15 get forced to 15.

ChatLogMaxAgeInDays.title: Chat log max age
ChatLogMaxAgeInDays.description: Controls how many days chat logs are kept. Negative values become virtually infinite.

DontRestoreBackup.title: Do not restore backup
DontRestoreBackup.description: Prevents automatic backup restore on corrupted saves when DisableDupeLogDeletes is also present.

EnableAFKKickPlayerCountPercent.title: AFK kick player count percent
EnableAFKKickPlayerCountPercent.description: Applies idle timeout only when online player count reaches a normalized fraction of MaxPlayers.

EnableMeshBitingProtection.title: Mesh biting protection
EnableMeshBitingProtection.description: If False, disables mesh biting protection.

FreezeReaperPregnancy.title: Freeze reaper pregnancy
FreezeReaperPregnancy.description: If True, freezes Reaper King pregnancy timer and experience gain.

LogChatMessages.title: Log chat messages
LogChatMessages.description: If True, enables advanced chat logging to ShooterGame/Saved/Logs/ChatLogs/<SessionName>/ in JSON format.

MaxStructuresInSmallRadius.title: Max structures in small radius
MaxStructuresInSmallRadius.description: Maximum structures allowed within RadiusStructuresInSmallRadius from the player position.

MaxStructuresToProcess.title: Max structures to process
MaxStructuresToProcess.description: Maximum structure batch size processed each server tick.

PreventOutOfTribePinCodeUse.title: Prevent out-of-tribe pin use
PreventOutOfTribePinCodeUse.description: If True, prevents players outside the tribe from using structure pin codes.

RadiusStructuresInSmallRadius.title: Small radius structure radius
RadiusStructuresInSmallRadius.description: Small radius dimension in Unreal Units used by MaxStructuresInSmallRadius.

ServerEnableMeshChecking.title: Enable mesh checking
ServerEnableMeshChecking.description: Used in foliage repopulation. Has no effect if forcedisablemeshchecking is set.

UpdateAllowedCheatersInterval.title: Update admin list interval
UpdateAllowedCheatersInterval.description: Time in seconds between refreshes of the remote admin list URL. Values lower than 3.0 are forced to 3.0.

UseCharacterTracker.title: Use character tracker
UseCharacterTracker.description: Enables character tracking. Can also be controlled by the disableCharacterTracker launch argument, which has priority.

UseExclusiveList.title: Use exclusive list
UseExclusiveList.description: If True, behaves like the exclusivejoin launch option.

AllowMultipleTamedUnicorns.title: Allow multiple unicorns
AllowMultipleTamedUnicorns.description: If True, allows multiple tamed unicorns.

SessionName.title: Session name
SessionName.description: Server name advertised in server browser.

Duration.title: Message duration
Duration.description: Duration in seconds for login message.

Message.title: Message of the day
Message.description: Message shown to players on login. Use \n for new line.
